Evergreen Leaf  
 


This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Evergreen Leaf

This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:1000
Merchant Value:0 pp 0 gp 1 sp 0 cp
Lucy Entry By:Kheldar
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-18 20:51:35
Page Updated:Thu Nov 2nd, 2023

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Quests | Recipes | Comments ]
This item is a ground spawn.

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Goru`kar Mesa
Quest Name
Ciodaru and Kathryn #6: Ciodaru's Fourth Gift
Used in 2 recipes.
Recipe list - Premium only.

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Butcherblock Mountains
Goru`kar Mesa
Greater Faydark
Warsliks Woods

In Goru`kar Mesa these are found at, (-687, -38, 182) (-664, 55, 182) (-690, 11, 182) (-1074, 71, 93).

In Greater Faydark, heading to Kelethin from Crushbone I found one on the path just by the first orc tent on the trail (loc?).


Uploaded January 11th, 2024 by iventheassassin

▲ Page top
Ground spawns easier to see
QuoteReply
# May 31 2022 at 10:59 PM Rating: Good
nytmare
Sage
1,350 posts
Game Update Notes: February 11, 2020
- The Evergreen Leaf spawn locations in Greater Faydark have been spread out so that they are less predictable. The leaves are now much larger and easier to see against the ground.

In Goru`kar Mesa, 4 leaves can be found as ground spawns around the big dryad tree. And another leaf ground spawn outside the southern wall of the dryad mesa at approx -1100, 30, 83 (exact locations vary). Respawn time is 5 minutes. There are also 2 windwillow acorn ground spawns in the same area around the tree, but in contrast to the leaves, the acorns are still tiny little flat squares and very hard to spot.

2017 update
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2017 at 3:52 AM Rating: Excellent
iventheassassin
400 posts
Actually there are no three spawn points near the Felwithe entrance, there are only two.
I checked all the locations from the previous poster (Nizzudien) and corrected their
location to be more precise. Had to delete a few spawn points as there was nothing on
the ground. Im sure these double spawn location only happened by adding up map
locations from different authors instead of verifying them. So in summary there are nine
known spawn points that got verified by me. The text color I used is orange (240, 127, 0).

Copy and paste this into your gfaydark_2.txt file.
Optionally you can copy it into gfaydark_1.txt or gfaydark_3.txt

P -31.1245, -2002.6071, -3.5184, 240, 127, 0, 1, Evergreen
P -33.4909, -2087.6743, -38.2302, 240, 127, 0, 1, Evergreen
P -2202.4609, 1484.9587, -5.5758, 240, 127, 0, 1, Evergreen
P 1123.9141, 2311.5786, -3.6156, 240, 127, 0, 1, Evergreen
P 2306.1526, 1962.4508, 22.4638, 240, 127, 0, 1, Evergreen
P 2108.8262, 1869.2965, -2.2749, 240, 127, 0, 1, Evergreen
P 1403.6792, -114.1580, -0.3856, 240, 127, 0, 1, Evergreen
P 1360.1732, -114.1999, -3.4744, 240, 127, 0, 1, Evergreen
P 968.1354, -1338.1617, 9.4558, 240, 127, 0, 1, Evergreen
▲ Page top
2017 update
QuoteReply
# Mar 22 2017 at 8:14 AM Rating: Decent
quaand2
8 posts
A simple clarification.
The person who mentioned the 3 leaf spawn was not stating there are 3 spawn points near the Felwithe entrance.
What he meant was that 3 leaves spawn at one point. One on top of the other.
that location is -1872.48, -2109.91, 0.69 (near the junction where the road divides to go to Kelethin and the Portal Spires.

I have picked up 3 leaves at this location multiple times.
The other location near Felwithe is a rare spawn. I have only picked up one leaf at that point. it is on the hill above the junction and is difficult to see.

I have not found leaves at any other point in the zone so far.

It seems that the acorns and the Evergreen leaf are spawning on a 5 + min timer. They appear to show up directly N, - S - E or W of the Windwillow -- currently in a counter clockwise pattern. i.e. if you find a spawn on the West side the next one will be on the North side. So far today all acorns. no leaves

Scholar
70 posts
In Goru;ku Mesa you have to use /showgrass off to have any chance of finding the Evergreen Leaf or the Windwillow Acorns --- the leaf is olive green leaf and the acorn is a little tiny green (somewhat bright green) spec. seems to be only 2 spawn every 5 min. Around the Wind Willow. Very hard to spot

Success comes when preparation meets opportunity -- and EQ is no exception.
▲ Page top
Update
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2011 at 8:41 AM Rating: Decent
shadowsedge
Scholar
298 posts
Mesa info
Evergreen leaf will spawn in 16 possible spots around the largest willow tree near Kathrine.
Acorns spawn in 5 possible spots on the east side.
Only 2 will be up at any time. Either 2 leafs, 2 acorns or both at once.
Spawn time for leafs can be anywhere from 1 second to 5 minutes but generally within 1 minute.
Acorns spawn time is about an hour.

Ducking helps see the spawns easier. Moving slow helps a lot as they are minuscule. Being short is even better, like a halfling. Turning gamma to 75 or higher helps. Turning off 1.1, 1.4, 2.0 and radial flora in options is extremely helpful.

After hanging around for 2 and a half hours I got 76 leafs and 15 acorn at the mesa. Finding them at Gfay is like looking for a black marble on a black floor...in the dark. You may get lucky but most likely not.

Leafs are for dyes that can be used for armor or green hand made back packs.
The back packs sell well in the bazaar due to their 10 slots, giant capacity and 10% weight reduction. Other colors have the same but green is harder to find than say...black. I made a good chunk of change since I am a 199 tailor. If your looking to sell back packs, there are easier colors to obtain but green goes with my gear color so I collected a lot in case I failed at making some.

These are the listed points I have on my maps but I am not sure how mapping works so I have post them all.

P 51.3958, 617.2676, 175.8954, 127, 0, 0, 1, WWA
P 25.5684, 653.0149, 176.2004, 0, 0, 127, 2, WWA
P 25.9837, 602.4886, 176.1403, 0, 240, 0, 2, WWA
P 32.9075, 591.5187, 177.2278, 127, 0, 0, 1, WWA
P -2.8356, 588.2534, 175.2457, 0, 127, 0, 2, WWA
P -5.7109, 564.4001, 175.7198, 127, 0, 0, 1, EL
P -1.5193, 532.3044, 177.5511, 127, 0, 0, 1, EL
P 8.6870, 564.1154, 176.3681, 0, 127, 0, 2, WWA
P -28.8159, 572.3978, 175.1494, 127, 0, 0, 1, EL
P -43.9329, 681.5331, 176.5915, 127, 0, 0, 2, EL
P -61.9675, 608.8543, 174.1676, 127, 0, 0, 2, EL
P -52.3312, 589.0648, 174.7228, 127, 0, 0, 1, EL
P 53.7775, 611.2808, 175.8720, 127, 0, 0, 1, EL
P 43.3775, 616.0327, 176.0550, 0, 127, 0, 1, EL
P 56.0520, 658.0539, 176.1187, 127, 0, 0, 1, EL
P -35.2585, 655.6418, 175.9490, 0, 240, 0, 1, WWA
P 19.2673, 688.0035, 177.7985, 0, 127, 0, 1, WWA
P 15.0531, 693.4297, 178.0903, 127, 0, 0, 1, EL
P 42.3044, 680.9377, 176.7468, 127, 0, 0, 1, EL
P 47.8689, 588.7090, 177.4016, 0, 240, 0, 1, EL
P 59.7190, 628.8618, 175.6907, 127, 0, 0, 1, EL
P -59.7794, 659.8775, 175.3081, 127, 0, 0, 1, EL
P -14.6178, 695.7056, 178.1669, 127, 0, 0, 1, EL
P -64.2471, 634.1862, 174.5345, 127, 0, 0, 1, EL
____________________________
I know you believe you understand what you think I said, but I am not sure you realize that what you thought you heard was not what I meant.

# Jul 23 2011 at 1:53 AM Rating: Decent
HSishi
View User Forum
Scholar
207 posts
Quote:
Turning off 1.1, 1.4, 2.0 and radial flora in options is extremely helpful.


I second that ... to explain: the options mentioned above (they're in the Advanced Options in Display page) make the ground look like a well-grown grass while turning them off makes the ground flat and muddy-brown. And on the brown floor you can see the green groundspawns very clearly.

//HSishi
____________________________
HSishi Shortfinger
Proud Rogue
Member of <Age of Unity>
Antonius Bayle

Interesting distribution - the Evergreen Leaves were all on the west side, while the Windwillow Acorns were all on the East side of the tree.

Being old school, I decided to get one of these from greater faydark rather than Goru Mesa. Unfortunately I didn't find any at the locs mentioned, so either they weren't up or have moved since the zone was changed. In any case, from randomly running about I found two at (1340, -970) in Greater Faydark on top of each other. They had a light green leaf graphic on the floor, rather than the light green polygon appearance they did a decade ago. They're still minuscule however!

I agree. The area around the willow tree has two evergreen leaves and two acorn ground spawns. It's a very small area to search in and avoids messing around with /locs. (The willow area is by where Kathryn spawns).
▲ Page top
Found the post
QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2007 at 8:07 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255425579
View User Forum
138 posts
I would hate that anyone has to search for these..

Note: The extract is found around the Willow in Mesa and at these locs in G Fay: (63, 166); (596, 200); (638, -96); (-411, -57); (962, 814); (-191, 7); (90, -400); (30, -2); (403, -440); (555, -234); (669, 774); (717, 748); (197, -483); (427, -321); ...
Goru`kar Mesa
Greater Faydark (also see Kelethin)
Wakening Land

I'm not to smart so it took me about 4 hours to figure this out... The EASY way..

Go to Mesa.. in the AREA with Kathryn there are several large trees; go to the one that is LIGHTER in color than the others.. looks like there is a light on it or something but its clearly tan while all the others are brown.

type out /showgrass off

Log out of the game and back in.. be sure the only plants you see now are the sunflower looking Silverspun petals and the trees and any windwillows standing around...

Now on the ground... VERY tiny at the base of the lighter tree you wil see VERY tiny FLAT leaves these will either be Windwillow Acorns or Evergreen leaves.. they are REALLY hard to see they are are so small... I would describe them a one half of a green skittle sitting on the ground. Yeah stupid small.

Okay... loot all the ones you find.. I found 6 Acorns and looted them all.. I came back about 1 hour later and looted them all again and the 5th one it was the Evergreen Leaf.

GL and if you found this helpful please give me a good rating... Other people figured this out... and didn't post it... I'd like to save you a few hours.

(FYI these are ALL over GFay BUT they are green and so is the ground there so they are IMPOSSIBLE to see... the ground in Mesa is brown so they are at least a different color)

I went back to that Light Willow and I started searching it (as if i didn't have enough) but I discovered alot more drops 5-6 every time, and I got a evergreen leaf every time. I believe my initial searches didn't go far enough from the base of the tree.. just be sure when you search you look hard all around the base of the tree the leaves are all over the place.

Remember if I saved you a ton of time... give me a good rating so this stays up top and someone else can get the help they need.
▲ Page top

5 posts
I turned the gamma up to about 70 percent after turning off the grass. That made them much easier to see around the base of the willow in Mesa.

TYVM what a timesaver, I had been looking for these things forever. They were so hard to see.

# Jun 05 2007 at 8:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591839901034
59 posts
Have not found any of the leaves at the spawn locations you mention, but I have found them fairly consistently at these locations.

Paste these lines into your gfaydark_1.txt file in your maps folder.

P -32.6138, -2003.4320, -3.5907, 0, 0, 0, 3, Evergreen
P -27.8968, -2134.8315, -42.7384, 0, 0, 0, 2, Evergreen
P -32.8241, -2086.5032, -37.4922, 0, 0, 0, 2, Evergreen
P -2257.5911, 1506.5389, -35.0124, 0, 0, 0, 2, Evergreen
P -2219.5781, 1492.5719, -14.2109, 0, 0, 0, 2, Evergreen
P 1125.4005, 2312.5715, -3.5923, 0, 0, 0, 2, Evergreen
P 1143.8113, 2282.9124, -3.8417, 0, 0, 0, 2, Evergreen
P 2307.0867, 1962.9231, 22.6837, 0, 0, 0, 2, Evergreen
P 2049.4622, 1868.9622, 5.1501, 0, 0, 0, 2, Evergreen
P 2108.8262, 1869.2965, -2.2749, 0, 0, 0, 2, Evergreen*

The one that is starred is on about a 6 minute timer and consistently spawns 3. The others are random from what I can tell.

This was a very helpful post. I didn't have to log to turn off grass though. ;-)

Found the post
QuoteReply
# May 13 2007 at 7:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592298738637
36 posts
U are correct in that turning the grass objects off with the chat command /showgrass off helps alot. I also maxed out the resolution in the OPTIONS - Display tab - video modes. This brought out alot more detail and the leaves and acorns stuck out like sore thumbs. They ground spawn within spitting distance from the "charm of lore" quest "silverspun petals" plant. (the red flower at the base of the tree). Well it seems that the Evergreen Leaf only spawns around the base of this tree. After 1/2 hour I have 10 leaves and 6 Windwillow Acorn. Gonna take a look in GFay see if I can find them there. Well just left GFay and did not find any there. After searching several of the locations listed in this thread, I came away empty handed. I have picked up a stack now in mesa on the dryad plateau so I would assume that they look the same in GFay. Well back in GFay with the leaves I got in mesa. Drop one on the ground and sure enough they disappear. After clicking the ground multiple times I picked it up. Dropped it again in another spot and they fade right into the ground. Will keep you all posted.

Edited, May 14th 2007 2:01pm by qiloff

Edited, May 14th 2007 2:54pm by qiloff
▲ Page top
Oh I feel your pain
QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2007 at 7:47 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255425579
View User Forum
138 posts
I had left a very discriptive post on how to find these... and it was appearantly removed... why I couldn't imagine.

The easiest way to get these is to go to the Goru Mesa... okay... now go to the elevated area in which you would find that annoying fairy chick Kathrine...

There are several trees... ONE tree is lighter in color than all the rest.. its in the middlish... it clearly looks different than the others...

At the base of this tree look DIRECTLY at the ground... and search for the leaves. They are very small and hard to see. Go round and round the base of this tree they spawn all over the place.
▲ Page top
Oh I feel your pain
QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2007 at 7:52 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255425579
View User Forum
138 posts
Oh yeah and they actually have PH's... some sort of Acorns. The respawn is 1 hour. On each trip around the base of the tree I would find 5-8 acorns or evergreen leaves... After three days of searching the green grass of Gfay and other zones I found this spot and scored 2 full stacks in a single afternoon.

Although... the quest I was working on... was very worth it... Dragoste effect PWNS.
